_comment: Parakeet ONNX model registry. transcribe-rs 0.3 expects a directory containing encoder-int8.onnx, encoder-int8.onnx.data, decoder_joint-int8.onnx, and vocab.txt. The Medium (0.6b v3 int8) variant is the only one currently shipping a confirmed-compatible ONNX layout — Small (110m) and Large (1.1b) NeMo checkpoints exist on HF but require additional conversion work outside transcribe-rs's supported surface, so they're shipped as PLACEHOLDERS. The downloader skips SHA256 verification when sha256 == "PLACEHOLDER" and logs a warning.

models.notes: PLACEHOLDER — currently unsupported by transcribe-rs. The 110m parakeet-tdt_ctc checkpoint is upstream at nvidia/parakeet-tdt_ctc-110m but the ONNX layout transcribe-rs requires is not published yet.
Parakeet TDT 0.6B v3 (int8). Source: nasedkinpv/parakeet-tdt-0.6b-v3-onnx-int8 on Hugging Face.
PLACEHOLDER — currently unsupported by transcribe-rs. The 1.1b parakeet-tdt_ctc checkpoint exists at nvidia/parakeet-tdt_ctc-1.1b but no compatible ONNX export is published.
